emails.subject: Copy of Master Agreement
emails.body: Copy of Master Agreement Tana: Don Scott of Exxon Power Team contacted the EOL Call Center this morning requesting a copy of his Company Master Agreement because it has been misplaced. I am not sure if you are the correct person to handle such request. Could you please assist or forward to the correct party responsible for such a request. Customer Info: Don Scott Exxon Power Team 610 765 6727 office 610 765 7727 fax Dscott@pwrteam.com Thanks for your assistance in this matter. CA EnronOnline Help Desk

emails.subject: Re: Copy of Master Agreement
emails.body: Re: Copy of Master Agreement If you are looking for a copy of an ISDA Master Agreement with Exxon, there is none. If you are looking for a physical power master you need to contact Rhonda Denton. I have access to financial trading agreements only. Clinton Anderson/ENRON@enronXgate 05/23/2001 07:49 AM
